trails.name: LAKE ROE HUT to HALFWAY HUT
RODGERS INLET HUT TO BUSHLINE ROUTE
APARIMA HUT TO PRINCHESTER SADDLE TRACK
trails.description: From Aparima Huts, this track travels up the Waterloo Burn to the Princhester Saddle Route, passing Becketts Hut.

trails.name: UPPER APARIMA/SPENCE BURN ROUTE
trails.description: This track connects Aparima Folks Hut and Spence Hut, following the Aparima River and Spence Burn.

trails.name: KEPLER TRACK - MOTURAU HUT TO RAINBOW RE
TE ANAU LAKESIDE WALK - YACHT CLUB TO WI
DUSKY TK - LOCH MAREE HUT TO LAKE ROE
DUSKY TK - LOCH MAREE HUT TO SUPPER COVE
DUSKY TK - UPPER SPEY HUT TO KINTAIL HUT
DUSKY TK - WILMOT PASS RD TO UPPER SPEY
GREEN LAKE TK JNCTN/RODGER INLET TK
LAKE HAUROKO CRPK TO SECOND BAY TK
MONUMENT TRACK
trails.description: This is a short but challenging tramping track from Hope Arm in Lake Manapouri up to the summit of The Monument, with great lake views in good weather.

trails.name: PEARL HARBOUR TO BACK VALLEY/HOPE ARM JC
TE ANAU WILDLIFE CENTRE TO CONTROL GATES
HENRY PASS TO GEORGE SOUND HUT
LAKE THOMSON HUT TO LAKE HANKINSON
DUSKY TK - KINTAIL HUT TO LOCH MAREE HUT
KEPLER TK - LUXMOORE SADDLE TO HANGING V
KEPLER TRACK - CONTROL GATES TO BROD BAY
KEPLER TK - RAINBOW REACH TO TE ANAU CON
KEPLER TK - HANGING VALLEY SHELTER TO IR
KEPLER IRIS BURN WATERFALL - ROCKY POINT
KEPLER TK - LUXMOORE HUT TO MT LUXMOORE
KEPLER TK ROCKY POINT INCL TO MOTURAU
HIDDEN LAKES JETTY TO EAST COVE/HIDDEN L
PRINCHESTER SADDLE ROUTE
trails.description: Part of the Te Araroa Trail, this challenging track starts at Princhester Road end and skirts the Waterloo Station to the Aparima Huts.

trails.name: LAKE TE ANAU TO LAKE HANKINSON TK
KEPLER TRACK - BROD BAY TO LUXMOORE HUT
Big Tōtara Walk
trails.description: This short walking track winds through forest to some of Southland’s largest and oldest tōtara trees in a forest that has never been logged.

trails.name: Borland Nature Walk
trails.description: This easy loop track in Fiordland forest in Monowai is suitable for families.

trails.name: Borland Road to Monowai Hut Track
trails.description: This tramping track leads from Borland Saddle to a hut at the northern end of Lake Monowai in Fiordland National Park.

trails.name: Boyd Creek Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track leads from the Milford Road up the Boyd Creek onto the tops of the Countess Range, in the Snowdon Forest area.

trails.name: Burnt Ridge Track
trails.description: This tramping track offers an easy walk from the Borland Lodge grounds to Lake Monowai, in Fiordland.

trails.name: Eldrig Peak Route
trails.description: This quite steep and difficult tramping track leads from the Borland Road through beech forest then into the tops where you can enjoy gorgeous views of Fiordland.

trails.name: George Sound Route
trails.description: This very challenging tramping route goes from Lake Te Anau across to George Sound, Fiordland.

trails.name: Green Lake Track
trails.description: This tramping track leads to a hut at attractive Green Lake in Monowai, Fiordland.

trails.name: Hanging Valley Track
trails.description: This steep tramping track in Deep Cove, Doubtful Sound leads up to an impressive hanging valley and views of the Huntleigh Falls and Deep Cove.

trails.name: Helena Falls Track
trails.description: This tramping track in Deep Cove, Doubtful Sound leads around the cove to a stream looking up to Helena Falls.

trails.name: Kepler Track: Carpark to Dock Bay and Brod Bay
trails.description: This easy track follows the first part of the Kepler Track (a Great Walk) around the Te Anau lake shore to two lovely swimming and picnicking - it's great for children and they can earn a Kiwi Guardians medal too! Catch a water taxi one way for a shorter

trails.name: Kepler Track: Carpark to Luxmore Hut
trails.description: This is an excellent full day walk on the Kepler Track (a Great Walk) or overnight tramp to challenge young teenagers - it has swimming beaches, limestone cliffs and glorious mountain and lake views.

trails.name: Kepler Track: Carpark to Rainbow Reach
trails.description: A pleasant walking track alongside the river through beech forest, along part of the Kepler Track (Great Walk) near Te Anau.

trails.name: Kepler Track: Rainbow Reach to Shallow Bay or Moturau Hut
trails.description: To sample the Kepler Track (a Great Walk) or for an easy overnight tramp for kids, follow this track through beech forest to Moturau Hut and Shallow Bay on Lake Manapouri.

trails.name: Lake Hauroko Lookout Track
trails.description: This steep tramping track climbs from the edge of Lake Hauroko to a lookout with great views over the lake and nearby mountain ranges.

trails.name: Lake Hauroko to Teal Bay Hut Track
trails.description: This rather difficult tramping track in the Lake Hauroko area goes around the lake via bays and bush-clad ridges towards Teal Bay Hut.

trails.name: Lake Hauroko Track
trails.description: This easy loop walking track skirts a swampy area close to Lake Hauroko in southern Fiordland.

trails.name: Lake Monowai Peninsula Lookout Track
trails.description: This pleasant, short walking track leads through beech forest to a lookout at Lake Monowai, Fiordland.

trails.name: North Borland Track
trails.description: This tramping track offers an excellent trip to the North Borland Hut in Monowai, Fiordland.

trails.name: Old Doubtful Sound Track
trails.description: This tramping track follows a century-old trail in Deep Cove, Doubtful Sound, through mixed podocarp forest.

trails.name: Pearl Harbour return via Circle Track
trails.description: This tramping track takes you on a pleasant, half-day walk through beech forest near Manapouri, to a hill viewpoint overlooking the lake.

trails.name: Pearl Harbour to Back Valley Hut Track
trails.description: A tramping track leading through beech forest to Back Valley Hut near Manapouri, with a side trip option to peaceful Lake Rakatu.

trails.name: Rodger Inlet Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track leads to a hut, then a route heads for the bushline at Lake Monowai, Fiordland.

trails.name: South Borland Track
trails.description: This short tramping track goes between Borland Lodge and 6km along the Borland Road, Monowai, Fiordland.

trails.name: Stockyard Cove Track
trails.description: This is a pleasant, short walking track in Hope Arm on Lake Manapouri, leading to either West Beach or the waterfalls above the cove.

trails.name: Takitimu Mountains tracks and routes
trails.description: Explore Takitimu Mountains on these tracks and routes.

trails.name: Visitor Centre to Kepler Track Carpark Walk
trails.description: This is an easy walking track along Te Anau lake edge to the start of the Kepler Track, with picnic, swimming and photo spots.

trails.name: Visitor Centre to Te Anau Bird Sanctuary Walk
trails.description: Enjoy an easy walk along the lakeside in Te Anau that takes you to the bird sanctuary where you can see the rare, flightless takahē and other birds.
